metrics.label: Website Sessions
metrics.note: Down from 72 in September — seasonal dip or content gap.

metrics.label: LinkedIn Audience
metrics.note: Up from 152. Steady growth through direct outreach.

metrics.label: Engagement Rate
metrics.note: 26 engagements on 873 impressions — solid for B2B.

findings.title: 3% Engagement Rate Is Strong for B2B
findings.description: When we publish, people engage. The audience is responding — the challenge is publishing consistently. 2 posts vs. a goal of 4 means we're leaving engagement on the table.

findings.title: Website Traffic Dipped (72 → 56)
findings.description: Could be seasonal or tied to lower content output. Without consistent posting to drive referral traffic, organic discovery is doing the heavy lifting alone.

findings.title: Partner Pitch Deck Ready for Outreach
findings.description: The pitch deck positions Miles & Memories well for strategic partnerships. Ready to start systematic outreach — this could be the highest-leverage growth channel.

actions.title: Partner Pitch Deck Completed
actions.description: Ready for outreach to strategic partners.

actions.title: Asana Project Management Implemented
actions.description: Better workflow and task tracking system in place.

actions.title: 2 LinkedIn Posts Published
actions.description: Below target of 4, but engagement was strong on both.

actions.title: Instagram Cross-Posting Research
actions.description: Looking into adapting LinkedIn content for Instagram.

nextSteps: Start cross-posting relevant LinkedIn content to Instagram.
Push for 4 LinkedIn posts in November.
Begin strategic partnership outreach using the new pitch deck.
